ItacPersonItem.Notes: Sebastiano di Alecci was the personal printer of Prince Luigi Sanseverino. See Luigi Sanseverino, Collectaneum seu Catena sanctorum patrum, et aliorum veterum auctorum in sanctum euangelium Matthaei..., Naples, 1659; Lorenzo Giustiniani, Saggio storico-critico sulla tipografia del regno di Napoli, Napoli, 1793, p. 170, (BL shelfmark: 662.f.24.(2.) )
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
